title: Job Opening Teacher at Allen Career Institute

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Allen Career Institute
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Allen Career Institute. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About Allen Career Institute:
Allen Career Institute is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allen Career Institute!
